name: The Severed Road
specialty: Specializing in exploring and mapping the rifts, they've earned a reputation for returning with rare artifacts and intact from the perilous tears in reality.

members.name: Zavian Nightshade
members.note: A scar runs down his left cheek, a reminder of a past rift encounter that cost him an eye

members.name: Elysia Ironfist
members.note: Wears a gauntlet embedded with a glowing crystal, rumored to have been gifted by a fallen goddess

members.name: Kyrus Thunderspire
members.note: Always carries a quiver of arrows dipped in a peculiar, luminescent substance

members.name: Rivka Silverwhisper
members.note: Her enchanting smile hides a sharp tongue and an uncanny ability to charm even the most guarded of targets

visual: They wear leather armor and carry a mix of modern and ancient weapons, identifiable by their unique emblem of a broken road on their chest plates. In public, they exude an air of discipline and determination.
reputation_note: Rumored to have ties with the Obsidian Lotus, but their allegiances remain unclear. Whispers suggest they are bound by a mysterious pact
